items.title: Heard on the Street Recap: AI Selloff Resumes
items.description: Major U.S. stock indexes fell on Wednesday, with the tech-heavy Nasdaq composite dropping 1% for the first time in a month.  The AI chip leader now has to satisfy certain "security requirements" to send its H200 chips to China, per new rules from the Trump administration.  Nvidia's shares fell 1.4%.
